## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Nextbillion.ai and fwd.digital for AI-driven content marketing and SEO strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/ShrhKygZ_KYFh4emNTwfSbD2PftJsxrV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital offers a comprehensive AI-powered content creation and SEO service, starting at $9,000/month](https://fathom.video/share/ShrhKygZ_KYFh4emNTwfSbD2PftJsxrV?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
  - [Their approach combines high-volume content production with strategic experimentation and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/ShrhKygZ_KYFh4emNTwfSbD2PftJsxrV?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
  - [Nextbillion.ai is exploring options to accelerate their content marketing efforts, with a decision timeline around end of January](https://fathom.video/share/ShrhKygZ_KYFh4emNTwfSbD2PftJsxrV?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)

## Topics

### fwd.digital's Content Marketing Approach

  - [Uses AI workflows and custom research agents to generate high-volume, quality content](https://fathom.video/share/ShrhKygZ_KYFh4emNTwfSbD2PftJsxrV?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Focuses on answering every question in a customer's journey](https://fathom.video/share/ShrhKygZ_KYFh4emNTwfSbD2PftJsxrV?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Employs a dense content strategy, aiming to become an authority in the space](https://fathom.video/share/ShrhKygZ_KYFh4emNTwfSbD2PftJsxrV?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Combines tutorial content with programmatic content generation](https://fathom.video/share/ShrhKygZ_KYFh4emNTwfSbD2PftJsxrV?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [Includes full end-to-end service: research, content creation, publishing, and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/ShrhKygZ_KYFh4emNTwfSbD2PftJsxrV?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)

### Success Metrics and Optimization Process

  - [Key metrics: production volume, indexing, impressions, click-through rates, and ultimately traffic](https://fathom.video/share/ShrhKygZ_KYFh4emNTwfSbD2PftJsxrV?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [Emphasizes rapid experimentation and learning cycles](https://fathom.video/share/ShrhKygZ_KYFh4emNTwfSbD2PftJsxrV?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
  - [Recommends doubling down on successful content clusters and applying learnings across the board](https://fathom.video/share/ShrhKygZ_KYFh4emNTwfSbD2PftJsxrV?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)
  - [Suggests link building as an additional strategy to accelerate ranking](https://fathom.video/share/ShrhKygZ_KYFh4emNTwfSbD2PftJsxrV?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Commercial Model and Engagement

  - [Starting engagement at $9,000/month](https://fathom.video/share/ShrhKygZ_KYFh4emNTwfSbD2PftJsxrV?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
  - [Includes a full team: managing editor, strategist, writers, and account managers](https://fathom.video/share/ShrhKygZ_KYFh4emNTwfSbD2PftJsxrV?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)
  - [Provides all necessary tools and technologies](https://fathom.video/share/ShrhKygZ_KYFh4emNTwfSbD2PftJsxrV?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Equates to roughly 10-20 cents per word, competitive with hiring individual writers](https://fathom.video/share/ShrhKygZ_KYFh4emNTwfSbD2PftJsxrV?tab=summary&timestamp=1218.0)

### Nextbillion.ai's Current Situation

  - [Already seeing success with content marketing and SEO efforts](https://fathom.video/share/ShrhKygZ_KYFh4emNTwfSbD2PftJsxrV?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
  - [Has 3,000 backlinks and an authority score of 33](https://fathom.video/share/ShrhKygZ_KYFh4emNTwfSbD2PftJsxrV?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
  - [Currently experimenting with content agents, but looking to potentially "turbocharge" efforts](https://fathom.video/share/ShrhKygZ_KYFh4emNTwfSbD2PftJsxrV?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)

### Additional Services

  - [fwd.digital offers AI outbound marketing as a separate work stream](https://fathom.video/share/ShrhKygZ_KYFh4emNTwfSbD2PftJsxrV?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
  - [Typically introduced after establishing a content relationship](https://fathom.video/share/ShrhKygZ_KYFh4emNTwfSbD2PftJsxrV?tab=summary&timestamp=1523.0)
  - [Can include email campaigns sending 10,000-20,000 emails per week](https://fathom.video/share/ShrhKygZ_KYFh4emNTwfSbD2PftJsxrV?tab=summary&timestamp=1565.0)

### Technical Product Content Strategies

  - [Experience with API and SDK products for developer audiences](https://fathom.video/share/ShrhKygZ_KYFh4emNTwfSbD2PftJsxrV?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
  - [Success with both traditional blog content and programmatic content generation](https://fathom.video/share/ShrhKygZ_KYFh4emNTwfSbD2PftJsxrV?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)
  - [Examples include creating directories, comparison pages, and technical documentation](https://fathom.video/share/ShrhKygZ_KYFh4emNTwfSbD2PftJsxrV?tab=summary&timestamp=1758.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send meeting recording and a sample SOW to Nextbillion.ai team](https://fathom.video/share/ShrhKygZ_KYFh4emNTwfSbD2PftJsxrV?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [Nextbillion.ai to review materials internally with additional team members](https://fathom.video/share/ShrhKygZ_KYFh4emNTwfSbD2PftJsxrV?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Reconnect in January to discuss potential engagement and next steps](https://fathom.video/share/ShrhKygZ_KYFh4emNTwfSbD2PftJsxrV?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [Nextbillion.ai to make a decision on their content strategy direction by end of Q1](https://fathom.video/share/ShrhKygZ_KYFh4emNTwfSbD2PftJsxrV?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
